name: Her punishment (Junko Enoshima)
description:
"Junko Enoshima has been found guilty. And this time, you're the one choosing her punishment"

You've finally taken down the mastermind and you've been chosen to decide her fate. Will you take your revenge for the pain she inflicted on you and your friends, or do you have other plans in mind?

Here is the second Junko bot I talked about a few days ago. This time you're the one in control.

I may do a possible third Danganronpa bot, though this time it will be a rpg bot. I'm gonna try to make a rpg bot that will simulate one of the killing with someof the characters from the game (probably with a reduced amount of character to not overload the bot with tokens). Probably won't be for now though so there will probably be some other characters in between.

And just like always, if you've got some request for some bots, Throw in a comment and maybe I'll do it
creator: Inkyosis
